scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint
scripts.start:desktop:release: bun run build:release:desktop && cd ./.bldr/build/desktop/$(go env GOOS)/$(go env GOARCH)/spacewave-dist/dist && ./spacewave
scripts.start:web:wasm: bun run bldr -- --log-level debug --minify-entrypoint=false start web --wasm
scripts.start:web:release: bun run build:release:web && bun run bldr -- static --path ./.bldr-dist/build/desktop/js/wasm/spacewave-dist/dist
scripts.start:web:release:debug: bun run build:release:web:debug && bun run bldr -- static --path ./.bldr-dist/build/desktop/js/wasm/spacewave-dist/dist
scripts.build:cli: bun run go:run -- github.com/s4wave/spacewave/bldr/cmd/bldr start cli spacewave -- --help > /dev/null 2>&1 && bun run go:run -- github.com/s4wave/spacewave/bldr/cmd/bldr start cli spacewave-cli -- --help > /dev/null 2>&1 && mkdir -p bin && cp .bldr/cli/spacewave/dist/spacewave bin/spacewave && cp .bldr/cli/spacewave-cli/dist/spacewave-cli bin/spacewave-cli && bun run cmd/spacewave/sync.ts && bun run cmd/spacewave-cli/sync.ts
scripts.test: bun run test:js && bun run test:browser && bun run test:go
scripts.test:help: echo 'Use: bun run test (not bun test, which runs bun built-in test runner)'
scripts.test:js: bun run test:js:alpha && bun run test:js:auth && bun run test:js:db && bun run test:js:forge && bun run test:js:identity && bun run test:js:net && bun run bldr:test:js
scripts.test:go:e2e: bun run test:go:e2e:bldr-comms && bun run test:go:e2e:core && bun run test:go:e2e:browser && bun run test:go:e2e:trace
scripts.format: bun run format:js && bun run format:go && bun run format:config
scripts.format:go: bun run go:aptre -- format && cross-env GOFLAGS=-mod=mod -tags=purego go fix ./...
scripts.lint: bun run lint:js && bun run lint:go
scripts.prepare: go mod vendor && rimraf ./.tools && bun run setup
scripts.bldr:check: bun run bldr:typecheck && bun run bldr:lint
scripts.bldr:build:cli: bun run bldr:bldr -- start cli bldr-demo-cli -- --help > /dev/null 2>&1 && mkdir -p ./bldr/bin && cp ./.bldr/cli/bldr-demo-cli/dist/bldr-demo-cli ./bldr/bin/bldr-demo-cli
scripts.bldr:dist: bun run bldr:build:release:web && bun run bldr:publish:release
scripts.bldr:format: bun run bldr:format:js && bun run bldr:format:go && bun run bldr:format:config
scripts.bldr:format:go: bun run go:aptre -- format ./bldr/... && go fix ./bldr/...
scripts.bldr:format:js:changed: git diff --name-only --diff-filter=d HEAD | grep '^bldr/.*\(\.ts\|\.tsx\|\.html\|\.css\|\.scss\)$' | xargs -I {} prettier --write {}
scripts.bldr:gen: bun run bldr:gen:proto && bun run bldr:gen:deps && bun run bldr:gen:go
scripts.bldr:gen:force: bun run bldr:gen:proto:force && bun run bldr:gen:deps && bun run bldr:gen:go
scripts.bldr:gen:deps: bun -e "const pkg = require('./package.json'); const distPkg = require('./bldr/dist/deps/package.json'); Object.entries(pkg.dependencies || {}).forEach(([name, version]) => { if (distPkg.dependencies[name]) { distPkg.dependencies[name] = version; } }); Object.entries(pkg.resolutions || {}).forEach(([name, version]) => { distPkg.resolutions[name] = version.replace(/^\^/, ''); }); require('fs').writeFileSync('./bldr/dist/deps/package.json', JSON.stringify(distPkg, null, 2));" && cd ./bldr/dist/deps && bun i
scripts.bldr:lint: bun run bldr:lint:go && bun run bldr:lint:js
scripts.lint:js:auth: echo No JS sources in auth.
scripts.lint:js:identity: echo No JS sources in identity.
scripts.bldr:prepare: bun run bldr:clean && rimraf ./.tools && bun run bldr:vendor && bun run setup
scripts.bldr:start:cli: bun run bldr:bldr -- start cli bldr-demo-cli --
scripts.bldr:start:desktop: bun run bldr:bldr -- start --plugins web desktop
scripts.bldr:start:desktop:release: bun run bldr:build:release && cd ./.bldr/build/desktop/$(go env GOOS)/$(go env GOARCH)/bldr-demo-release/dist && ./bldr-demo
scripts.bldr:start:web: bun run bldr:bldr -- --minify-entrypoint=false start --plugins web web
scripts.bldr:start:web:wasm: bun run bldr:bldr -- --log-level debug --minify-entrypoint=false start web --wasm
scripts.bldr:start:web:release: bun run bldr:build:release:web && bun run bldr:bldr -- static --path ./.bldr-dist/build/web/js/wasm/bldr-demo-release/dist
scripts.bldr:start:web:release:debug: bun run bldr:build:release:web:debug && bun run bldr:bldr -- static --path ./.bldr-dist/build/web/js/wasm/bldr-demo-release/dist
scripts.bldr:test: bun run bldr:test:js && bun run bldr:test:go
scripts.test:go:alpha: packages=$(go list ./cmd/... ./core/... ./plugin/... ./sdk/... | grep -Ev '^(github.com/s4wave/spacewave/core/e2e($|/)|github.com/s4wave/spacewave/core/resource/space$|github.com/s4wave/spacewave/core/resource/testbed$|github.com/s4wave/spacewave/core/trace/service$)'); test -z "$packages" || cross-env GOFLAGS=-mod=mod go test -tags skip_e2e,purego $packages
scripts.test:js:auth: echo No JS tests in auth.
scripts.test:js:identity: echo No JS tests in identity.
scripts.test:js:net: echo No JS tests in net.
scripts.bldr:test:js: vitest run --config bldr/vitest.config.ts && bun run bldr:typecheck
